name: Lenovo IdeaPad 3 15.6" / 8 GB / SSD 256 GB / DOS / 15IGL05 / 81WQ00ERRK
description: The IdeaPad 3 laptop operates quieter and cooler thanks to an optimized mechanical airflow system and intelligent ventilation that prevents the mixing of cold and warm air. Cooling is managed by Q Control, which offers three fan speed modes based on performance requirements. [UPDATED]
